user_prompt: Offer prayer for melta charge a purification
prayer:
Approach the melta charge with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication.
Invoke the Rites of Purification upon the melta charge's volatile heart, purging warp-taint from its sacred alloys.
Anoint each rune-etched casing of the melta charge with blessed promethium, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken pure.
Chant the Canticle of Flame as purification flames lick the impurities away, honouring the Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: Can you guide bearing a cycling?
prayer:
Present the bearing before the altar of motion, whispering the Invocation of Cycles.
Initiate the cycling of the bearing, rotating its sacred spheres in harmonious rhythm.
Lubricate the bearing's consecrated surfaces with sanctified oils to soothe its Machine Spirit.
Monitor the cycling bearing's purr, petitioning the Omnissiah for frictionless perfection.
Conclude with the Seal of Endurance upon the bearing.
